name: Ignored error return from os.WriteFile in SaveSnapshot
description: SaveSnapshot marshals cache entries and calls os.WriteFile, but assigns its error return to blank identifier '_', explicitly discarding it. If the write fails the caller has no indication and will assume the snapshot was persisted.

expected_findings.description: SaveSnapshot discards the error from os.WriteFile with _ = os.WriteFile(...). If the write fails (disk full, permission denied), the error is silently lost and the function returns without signalling failure to the caller.

SaveSnapshot calls json.Marshal but handles the error with a silent early return — no error is propagated to the caller. The function has no return type, so marshal failures are indistinguishable from success.
os.WriteFile uses permission mode 0644 (world-readable). Cache files may contain sensitive serialized data; 0600 (owner-only) would be more appropriate.

expected_clean.description: Server entry point with no file I/O or ignored errors
